arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Nunes, Doku, Lewis start for Man City as Ince scores Watford stunner
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides player ratings from Manchester City's 2-1 victory over Watford in the EFL Cup third round.

arts.ttl: ‘Irreplaceable’: Pep Guardiola praises Rodri as City wait for injury diagnosis
arts.athr: Jamie Jackson at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: ‘He will be out for a long time. We wait for the doctors’ Rodri sustained suspected ACL injury against Arsenal Pep Guardiola will find out on Wednesday if he will be without Rodri for the rest of the season and has described his star midfielder as “irreplaceable”. The 28-year-old sustained a suspected anterior cruciate ligament injury 21 minutes into the 2-2 draw with Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday. Guardiola, after his much-changed side beat Watford 2-1 in the Carabao Cup third round, was asked how long Rodri may be out. “Still we don’t have the definitive [diagnosis] but he will be out for a long time, a while,” Guardiola said. “But there are some opinions that maybe it will be less than we expected. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals texts to Mikel Arteta following Man City and Arsenal controversy
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has said last weekend's controversial Premier League meeting with Arsenal will NOT impact his personal relationship with Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Guardiola: Rodri needs surgery and 'out for long, long time'
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri will be out for "a long, long time" and requires surgery, manager Pep Guardiola has said.

arts.ttl: Pep: 'Irreplaceable' Rodri out 'for a long time'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says Rodri will be out "for a long time" with the knee injury he suffered against Arsenal, but the Manchester City manager is retaining hope that it could be "less than expected."

arts.ttl: Manchester City 2 Watford 1 - how the action unfolded
arts.sum: A minute-by-minute account of Watford's 2-1 defeat at the Etihad in the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: Rodri facing long lay-off and will need surgery – Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: The Manchester City midfielder was forced off against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man City edge past Watford in first look at life without Rodri
arts.sum: First-half goals from Jeremy Doku and Matheus Nunes booked Manchester City's place in the Carabao Cup last 16 despite a late scare in their 2-1 win over Watford.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hits back at Man City complaints with strong five-word message
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta pointed to the brief period when Man City were down to 10 men as evidence that Pep Guardiola's side know all about controlling the game in moments of adversity as row over Sunday's fiery draw rumbles on

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola confirms crushing Rodri injury blow as Man City pin hopes on final tests
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola insists Manchester City will have a good season despite the 'big blow' of losing Rodri for a long time with injury.
